prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and improve endurance for competitive cycling

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 3 meals for one day
All meals are vegetarian, gluten-free, and nut-free
Meals provide adequate protein and carbohydrates for athletic performance
Plan is concise and practical to prepare
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athelete
scenario: Testing with an athlete with multiple dietary restrictions (vegetarian, gluten-free, nut allergy) to verify the prompt adapts meal suggestions while maintaining athletic nutrition needs

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle recovery and strength performance optimization

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with 4-5 meals/snacks
Total daily protein is at least 170g (2g per kg body weight)
Includes specific foods with macronutrient targets for each meal
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athelete
scenario: Testing with a strength-sport athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-optimized meals with specific macronutrient ratios for muscle recovery and performance

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with carbohydrate loading and optimal hydration for high-endurance performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories with carbohydrates comprising 55-65% of total intake
Includes specific hydration strategy with fluid intake recommendations throughout the day
Contains 4-5 meals/snacks distributed across the day with timing suitable for marathon training
Compact format presented as concise 1-day plan without excessive detail
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athelete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration strategies
